subject: docs(todo): drop "Random theme on load toggle" non-actionable note
body:
The item self-labeled "Not planned" and only documented a decision —
TODO is for pending work, not decision archival. The choice to use
combos (Approach B) over per-mode-independent picker (Approach A) is
already captured in CLAUDE.md's THEME_DARK_MODE pattern section.
